科学创造终身财富

Low-risk, steady-growth, tax-efficient strategies that create lifetime income and full-range protection — for your family's education, retirement, healthcare, and legacy. 低风险、稳增长、省税高效的理财策略，为您的家庭创造终身收入与全方位保障 —— 涵盖子女教育、退休养老、医疗健康与财富传承。

The Universal Wealth Equation万能财富方程式

Income收入 + Investment+ 投资 − Spending− 消费 − Debt− 债务 − Taxes− 税务 − Risk− 风险 − Inflation− 通胀 − Labor− 劳碌 = WEALTH= 财富

Most families only optimize one or two variables. We help you optimize all eight.大多数家庭只优化其中一两个变量，我们帮您全面优化所有八个变量。

8+Years of Experience年专业经验
200+Premium Clients高端客户
10,000+Students Educated受益学员
30+Expert Professionals位专家团队

Why MaxLife Academy为什么选择万福

Education First. Strategy Second.
Products Last.教育为先 · 策略为本 · 产品为用

We are not product pushers. We are educators and strategists who help you understand your money before you move it.我们不是推销产品，而是先帮您真正读懂自己的财务，再制定科学的策略。

🎓

Learn the Science学习理财科学

Free workshops and courses on Personal Finance Science — taxes, retirement, college funding, insurance, and entrepreneurship — taught in plain language, in English and Chinese.免费讲座与课程，涵盖税务优化、退休规划、大学教育基金、保险与创业 —— 中英双语，通俗易懂。

🧭

Get a Personal Strategy量身定制策略

A team of 30+ financial professionals, CPAs, attorneys, and insurance experts builds a plan around your family — not a one-size-fits-all product.30多位理财师、注册会计师、律师和保险专家组成的团队，为您的家庭量身定制方案，而非千篇一律的产品。

🛡️

Protect & Grow for Life终身保障与增值

Low-risk, steady-growth, tax-efficient vehicles designed to produce a high lifetime income stream with full-range protection for every life stage.低风险、稳增长、省税高效的理财工具，为人生每个阶段提供终身收入与全面保障。

💛 We donate 20% of our profits to charity — supporting students, elderly in need, and financial literacy for all.💛 我们将 20% 的利润捐赠慈善基金 —— 资助学生、帮助有需要的长者、推广全民财商教育。

Our Services我们的服务

Eight Levers. One Complete Plan.八大杠杆 · 一套完整方案

Every variable in the Wealth Equation is a lever we can pull for you.财富方程式中的每个变量，都是我们为您优化的杠杆。

A

Lifetime Passive Income终身被动收入

Guaranteed income streams you can never outlive.保证终身领取、活多久领多久的收入流。

B

Asset Accumulation资产稳健增值

Steady, protected growth without market losses.锁定收益、免受市场下跌损失的稳健增长。

C

Smart Spending智慧消费

Save 10–60% on essential household bills.家庭必需开支节省 10–60%。

D

Self-Financing自我融资

Become your own bank with strategic borrowing.善用策略性借贷，做自己的银行。

E

Tax & College Planning税务与大学规划

Legally reduce taxes and maximize financial aid.合法省税，最大化大学助学金资格。

F

Risk Protection风险保障

Life, long-term care, chronic and critical illness coverage.人寿、长期护理、慢性病与重疾全面保障。

G

Inflation Defense抵御通胀

Strategies that keep your purchasing power growing.让购买力持续增长的抗通胀策略。

H

Effortless Management轻松管理

Set it up once — we review and adjust with you for life.一次配置，终身陪伴式年度检视与调整。

Solutions & Products解决方案与产品

Tools Built for Every Goal为每个目标配备的工具

Flagship旗舰方案

MaxLife Fund万福人寿基金 MaxLife

Fixed Index Universal Life (FIUL)指数型万能寿险 (FIUL)

  • Guaranteed floor — never lose to market crashes保底收益 —— 市场暴跌也不亏损
  • Tax-free growth and tax-free access免税增长、免税取用
  • Borrow against your policy anytime可随时抵押借款、灵活周转
  • Lifetime income + legacy protection终身收入 + 财富传承保障
Retirement退休首选

MaxRetire Fund万福养老基金 MaxRetire

Fixed Indexed Annuity (FIA)指数型固定年金 (FIA)

  • Guaranteed lifetime retirement income保证终身退休收入
  • Transfer longevity risk to the insurer将长寿风险转移给保险公司
  • Principal-protected accumulation本金保护型资产累积
  • Estate planning flexibility灵活的遗产规划选项

🩺 Living Benefits生前福利

Long-term care, chronic, critical & terminal illness coverage — use your benefits while you're alive.长期护理、慢性病、重疾与末期疾病保障 —— 生前即可使用的保险福利。

🏦 Self-Financing自我融资 / 私人银行

A smart leveraging tool to build your personal bank and power strategies like BRRRR real-estate investing.革命性的智慧杠杆工具，打造私人银行体系，助力 BRRRR 房产投资等策略。

🧾 Tax Reduction省税策略

Holistic, legal tax strategies that can save families thousands every year.全面、合法的省税避税策略，每年为家庭节省数千美元。

🎓 College Tuition Planning大学学费规划

Asset structuring to maximize financial aid and cut out-of-pocket college costs.通过资产结构优化，最大化助学金资格，大幅降低自付学费。

🏠 Estate Planning遗产规划

Living trusts and transfer strategies that minimize estate taxes and protect your legacy.生前信托与传承策略，降低遗产税，守护家族财富。

💛 Private Foundation私人慈善基金会

The "3-Win" charity structure — benefits for the donee, the donor, and society.「三赢」慈善策略 —— 受赠人、捐赠人与社会共同受益。

💰 Huge Household Savings家庭开支大节省

Save 10–60% on health plans, internet, mobile, utilities, dental, and travel.健康保险、网络、手机、水电、牙科、旅游等开支节省 10–60%。

Which tool fits my family? Ask us — free →哪种方案适合我家？免费咨询 →

Free Financial Education免费财商教育

10,000+ Students Have Changed How They Think About Money超过一万名学员在这里颠覆了财富思维

Join free webinars and workshops through the 9Fortunes Wealth Club platform. No sales pitch — just knowledge you can use immediately.通过九福财富俱乐部平台参加免费网络讲座与工作坊。没有推销，只有立即可用的知识。

  • 🚀 Low-risk entrepreneurship & leadership🚀 低风险创业与领导力培养
  • 🧠 Mental resilience & thriving in the AI era🧠 心理韧性与 AI 时代的职业转型

Franchise Opportunity创业加盟机会

From One Person, To An Army.从一个人，到一支军队。

Build your own financial-services business in an underserved blue-ocean market — the Chinese-American community — with earning potential beyond $1M.在华人社区这片尚待开发的蓝海市场，建立属于您自己的金融服务事业 —— 收入潜力超过百万美元。

🚀

Low Cost, Low Risk低成本 · 低风险

Start part-time with little upfront cost. Keep your day job while you build. A proven platform, FinTech tools, training, and expert mentorship are all provided.几乎零成本起步，可兼职经营。成熟的平台、金融科技工具、系统培训与专家指导一应俱全。

🔁

Recurring Residual Income持续被动收入

Earn commissions from your own clients plus overrides from the team you build — income that keeps paying year after year.既有个人客户佣金，又有团队业绩分红 —— 年复一年持续增长的收入。

🤝

Your Business, Your Way您的事业 · 您做主

Become a financial education consultant, insurance broker, loan advisor, or build your own chain of financial-service teams under a proven model.可成为财商讲师、保险经纪、贷款顾问，或依托成熟模式打造自己的金融服务连锁团队。

Start Free — Explore the Opportunity免费注册 · 了解创业机会

Questions & Answers常见问题

Frequently Asked Questions您可能想知道

Who are you, and why should I trust your financial advice?你们是谁？为什么值得信任？

Our founder has 8+ years as a financial educator and strategist, serving 200+ premium clients and 10,000+ students, with multiple franchised teams and annual performance awards. LinkedIn profile and customer references are available on request — just ask during your free consultation.创始人拥有8年以上财商教育与策略规划经验，服务超过200位高端客户、上万名学员，带领多支加盟团队并屡获年度业绩大奖。LinkedIn 资料与客户推荐均可提供 —— 欢迎在免费咨询时索取。

How do I join MaxLife Academy and start learning?如何加入万福财商学堂开始学习？

Enroll in a free membership at the 9Fortunes platform, then look for "Classes" after logging in. All educational content is free.在九福平台免费注册会员，登录后点击「Classes」即可开始学习。所有教育内容完全免费。

Is the consultation really free? What's the catch?咨询真的免费吗？有什么条件？

Yes — completely free, with no obligation. We believe education comes first. If a strategy or product fits your goals, we'll explain exactly how it works and how we're compensated. You decide.是的，完全免费且无任何义务。我们坚持教育为先。如果某个策略或产品适合您，我们会清楚说明其运作方式与我们的佣金来源，决定权始终在您手中。

I'm already a policy holder. How do you support me?我已经是保单持有人，如何获得后续服务？

Reach us any time throughout the life of your policy — annual reviews, policy adjustments, benefit questions. Book a time on Calendly or call us directly.在保单有效期内随时联系我们 —— 年度检视、保单调整、福利咨询。可通过 Calendly 预约或直接致电。

I'm interested in the franchise business. How do I start?我对加盟创业感兴趣，如何开始？

Register for a free membership first, then connect with us about business seminars and startup guidance. We'll walk you through the model step by step.先免费注册会员，然后与我们联系参加创业讲座与启动指导，我们会一步步为您讲解商业模式。

Your Family's Financial Future Starts With One Conversation.您家庭的财务未来，从一次对话开始。

30 minutes. Zero cost. Zero pressure. In English or Chinese.30分钟 · 零费用 · 零压力 · 中英文皆可
